name: Ricotta Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add vanilla or lemon extract, then beat in eggs one at a time.
3. Stir in Ricotta cheese and beat for an additional minute.
4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the mixture.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-14 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet before removing them.
